---
pagetitle: "Committee members"
---

::: grid
::: {#organizers_banner .g-col-12 .title}
# Committee Members
:::

::: {.g-col-6 .text_block}

### Organizing Committee

This bioinformatics mini project conference is part of the undergraduate course Bioinformatics (BISB211606), organized by the Department of Tropical Biology, Faculty of Biology, Universitas Gadjah Mada (UGM).

<small>
**[UNIVERSITAS GADJAH MADA](https://ugm.ac.id/)**  
**[Faculty of Biology](https://biologi.ugm.ac.id/en/)**  
Jalan Teknika Selatan, Sekip Utara  
Yogyakarta 55281, Indonesia  
[oia.biology@ugm.ac.id](mailto:oia.biology@ugm.ac.id)

#### Course Responsibles
- Prof. Dra. Tuty Arisuryanti, M.Sc., Ph.D.
- [Matin Nuhamunada, M.Sc., Ph.D.](https://www.matinnu.org/author/matin-nuhamunada/)
- Dr. Dwi Sendi Priyono, M.Si.
- Dr. Tri Rini Nuringtyas, M.Sc.
- Arief Muammar, M.Sc.

#### Teaching Assistants
- Salman Ali Nazar
- Alda Zaenida Nurul Raizma
- Kyla Tattvara Faza Arumdapta
- Winda Lutfiana Hafidz
- Afra Majida Hariono
- Nurul Istiqomah
- Nirina Adelita Putri
- Muhammad Meshal Ramadhayesa
- Huriyah Winda Nabillah
- Adelia Khairunnisa
- Annisa Nur Baety
- Feliciana Clara Henderison
- Achmad Nadhmi Arfa

</small>

<break></break>

:::

<break></break>
:::
